calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-05-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Franchesca Callejo, via Zoom, for Teresa F. Martinez, Administrator.

The court and Ms. Callejo discuss the issues noted by the probate Examiner specifically, regarding the filing of a copy of the home equity line of credit and a copy of Dan the Handyman Meyers' invoice. Ms. Callejo advises that she has a copy of both documents requested by the court and reports that she will file both as soon as possible. Ms. Callejo confirms that Mr. Meyers' costs were incurred to fix and make upgrades to what would have been the decedents' room, which she addresses in her first supplement. After additional discussion, the court instructs Ms. Callejo to submit the previously mentioned documents for e-filing on or before noon this Friday, Jun-24-2022. The court advises Ms. Callejo to deliver courtesy copies of the documents and an updated proposed order to the probate Examiner.

The matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Bastain. Not Reported.
